title: Major Update — Instructional Design LMS + AI Tutor Platform
changes: Rebuilt lesson pedagogy: Lesson Objective → Theory → Examples → Common Mistakes → Skill Practice → Homework → Feedback → Rewrite → Reflection → Success Criteria → Mastered
Dynamic Ask Chị Context Engine with Quick, Standard, Full Context, Essay Review, Homework Review, Grammar Help, Vocabulary Help and Brainstorm Help
Course QA Mode added to every lesson
v2.x → v3.0 migration keeps accounts, progress, XP, homework, essays, errors and teacher notes

title: Lesson Pedagogy + Exercise Bank + Coding UI
details: One lesson = one skill rule
Lesson 1 orientation fixed
Skill Practice renamed
1000+ micro exercises
Exercise Bank with generator
Coding dashboard UI polish

title: Offline LMS
details: Dashboard, Roadmap, Lesson, Practice, Homework, Essay Workspace, Prompt Bank, Error Book, Vocabulary, Idea Bank, Feedback, Study Buddy.
70 lessons, 210 prompts, 210 vocabulary items, 135 idea-bank entries.

title: Learning Data + Teacher Workflow
details: Student Profile, Backup & Profile, Teacher Notes, Lesson History, Band History, Review Queue, Revision History.

title: Intelligent IELTS Writing Tutor
details: Today's Learning Plan, onboarding, locked lesson workflow, adaptive homework rules, daily study sessions.
Review Queue page, Band Tracker, Teacher Mode, Custom Assignment, smarter Essay revision pipeline.

title: Context Engine + Multi-User LMS
details: Dynamic Ask Teacher Prompt with Quick / Standard / Full Context modes

Student Export and Admin Export

title: Idea Bank Hotfix + IELTS Prompt Overload
details: Fixed Idea Bank render error caused by old IELTS_DATA.ideas alias.
Expanded Prompt Bank to 1,680 IELTS Task 2 prompts across 20 topics and 7 essay types.
Prompt Bank now feels more like a real IELTS practice library for daily study.
